entry.title: Re: HU and product task for outbound
entry.content:
Hi,

"Can you recommend a documentary on the subject?"

Not really. I mean, there is documentation about the different storage type behaviors and putaway / picking rules on help.sap.com, so I guess you need to check this first, but I can't say if this really answers your question.

Brgds

Juergen

entry.title: How KSTBS field is calculated in the PRCD_ELEMENTS table.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a scenario where I have the shipment details, but I want to know how exactly the value of KSTBS(scale base value) field is calculated in the PRCD_ELEMENTS table, or from where that KSTBS value is being fetched.

Please help me with some solution.

We have the S/4 hana system, and we are following all the standard steps.

entry.title: Como Iniciar uma Carreira SAP com dicas essenciais
entry.content:
Você já ouviu falar sobre SAP e está interessado em iniciar sua carreira nessa área emocionante e em constante crescimento? Você veio ao lugar certo! Neste blog, vamos explorar algumas dicas essenciais para profissionais que desejam dar os primeiros passos na carreira SAP.

1. Conheça o Mercado de SAP

O primeiro passo para iniciar sua carreira em SAP é entender o mercado e suas demandas. O SAP é um dos principais sistemas de software empresarial do mundo, utilizado por milhares de empresas em todo o globo. Isso significa que há uma grande demanda por profissionais qualificados em SAP, desde consultores até desenvolvedores e analistas.

2. Educação e Certificações

Investir em educação e certificações é fundamental para se destacar no mercado SAP. Existem vários cursos e certificações disponíveis, que abrangem diferentes áreas do SAP, como FI (Financeiro), MM (Gestão de Materiais), SD (Vendas e Distribuição), entre outros. Certifique-se de escolher um curso que seja relevante para suas metas de carreira e que seja reconhecido pela indústria.

3. Experiência Prática

Além da educação formal, a experiência prática é crucial para se tornar um profissional SAP bem-sucedido. Procure oportunidades de estágio, projetos acadêmicos ou mesmo voluntariado em eventos e palestras, é o principal, atuar profissionalmente em empresas que usem o SAP. Isso lhe dará uma exposição valiosa ao sistema e ajudará a construir seu portfólio.

4. Mantenha-se Atualizado

O mundo do SAP está em constante evolução, com novas atualizações e tecnologias sendo lançadas regularmente. É importante que você se mantenha atualizado com as últimas tendências e desenvolvimentos do SAP, participando de cursos de reciclagem, conferências e grupos de discussão online.

5. Networking

Por fim, não subestime o poder do networking na indústria SAP. Participe de eventos, conferências e grupos de discussão online para conhecer outros profissionais da área, trocar experiências e aprender com os melhores. O networking pode abrir portas para oportunidades de emprego e parcerias comerciais no futuro.

Em resumo, iniciar uma carreira em SAP requer dedicação, educação e experiência prática. Ao seguir essas dicas essenciais, você estará no caminho certo para se tornar um profissional SAP de sucesso. Boa sorte em sua jornada!

Saibam mais sobre essas e outras dicas de como se tornar um consultor SAP com o vídeo Abaixo:

https://youtube.com/live/vHpCZ6Vc-i8

 Se você tiver alguma dúvida ou gostaria de compartilhar suas próprias experiências sobre iniciar na carreira SAP, sinta-se à vontade para deixar um comentário abaixo.

entry.title: Re: Recreate Kyma enviroment
entry.content:
You will have to manually remove the connectivity proxy module from your kyma environment and then you could try to delete kyma environment again.

However, as your kyma environment is already expired you may need to attempt to delete the entire subaccount.

entry.title: Re: RAP Node Extensibility for Unmanaged BO
entry.content: Maybe @Andre_Fischer has some information about features on a roadmap?

entry.title: Re: No Record Found in CO1P
entry.content: Hi, you need to maintain test sequence containing confirmation BAPI first, and the commit BAPI. you can refer the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/how-to-test-bapi-function-module-in-sap/ba-p/13459439

entry.title: Re: Need example for DATA.APPEND for creating new records
entry.content:
DATA and DATA.APPEND are not used for creating new measures.

From the online help:

This function allows you to write values and create records based on the scope. By default, DATA function first only cleans the target scope and updates it with a specific value or data filtered out by the RESULTLOOKUP function. If you want to append data to the target scope instead, you can extend the DATA function to DATA.APPEND.

You can find good examples of how to use this in the online help for SAP Analytics Cloud:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/afe93e3cf1414a7b8419baad11cc066e.html?locale=en-US#data-function

Regards,

Peter

entry.title: Re: sales order item First Date
entry.content: Thank you, but unfortunately we don't use VBEP table in our plant

entry.title: Person is already being processed by user Service ID S_XI_PX0400
entry.content:
Hi,

WD to SAP Int. Error. Emp is existing in WD but not interfaces to SAP, so trying to manual hire in pA40 but getting below error Please assist on below error 

 

Person is already being processed by user Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx 

Message No. PBAS_SERVICE001

Diagnosis

If two users change a person's data at the same time, the system cannot decide which changes have priority. For this reason, only one user is ever permitted to make changes at any one time.

User Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx is currently editing the person.

System Response

The system does not allow you to edit the person.

Procedure

Wait until user Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx  has finished editing the person.

Procedure for System Administration

User S_XI_PXxxxx  keeps a lock for lock object EPPRELE 80124140.

entry.title: Download GL account master with data control information
entry.content:
How to Download GL accounts with supplementary Information. like data control etc.

Thank You

entry.title: SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain (SAP IBP) 2405 - Available Now!
entry.content:
We're excited to share our latest innovations with you.

Today, May 3, 2024, SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain 2405 was generally released as planned.

With our advanced AI-based technology, we have introduced a completely automated outlier detection system that empowers you to make data-driven decisions with utmost confidence, as it identifies and flags any anomalies in your data, ensuring accuracy and reliability.

Check out this and some of the numerous other highlights included in this release:

Demand

Improved Forecast Accuracy through AI-Powered Automated Outlier Correction

You can now automate outlier detection and correction in your sales history data by using machine learning algorithms. 
Depending on the sales pattern (for example trend, seasonal or sporadic), the system automatically applies a proper outlier detection and correction method fitting to the individual product.

By automatically pinpointing and adjusting outliers in your sales history data, this feature minimizes the time spent on data cleaning while increasing the accuracy of your sales forecasts.
Leveraging multiple machine learning algorithms, the system ensures that each data point is cross-validated before being classified as an outlier, enhancing the reliability of your data.

Aggregated Lifecycle Planning for Product Assignments

Forecasting for new products is now a lot more flexible as product lifecycle settings can be considered when forecasting on aggregated level.

Let's assume you want to substitute an old product at the SKU level with a new one and therefore you create a product assignment in the Manage Product Lifecycle app. Your forecasting, however, is done at the product group level rather than the SKU level. In previous releases, the product assignment you just made would have been ignored. Now, the assignment can be considered by the forecasting engine, ensuring better forecasting results.

This feature can be used during forecasting as well as within ABC/XYZ segmentation and forecast automation.

Planning UIs 

Efficient Analysis with Contextual Navigation

Quite frequently, an issue can’t be analyzed and solved with one single planning view. You often need to load additional components and adjust your filters.
To achieve optimal efficiency, the Planner Workspaces app now provides contextual navigation. This feature allows you to navigate from one component to another, while passing the selected context as a filter.

You can configure navigations tailored to your business needs that guide you through the Planner Workspace. By selecting data in the source component and opening a contextual navigation, the data in the target component is filtered using the selected data in the source component. You can request components on the fly to keep your workbook definition lean.

SAP Best Practices / Inventory

Deep Insights into Working Capital Decisions across the Supply Chain with Analytics Stories for Inventory


Analytics Stories for Inventory Planner are now included with SAP Best Practices content, serving as a foundation to adopt and analyze inventory investment for operational supply or tactical decision support.  The dashboards help you evaluate scenarios to foresee risk and opportunities to balance service and cost.

The sample content can be used as a template for inventory operator outputs in SAP IBP, enabling a quick scenario output comparison to quantify impact of changes for improved inventory investment decision making. It includes visualizations on key operator inputs such as forecast error, lead time error, and target service level as well as outputs on slow moving stock, safety stock in volumes and currency, and key drivers of stock. 

IBP General

Production Planning Integration Considering Minimum and Maximum Supply Constraints    

With the latest feature pack SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS1, you can now integrate minimum and maximum supply constraints. Using these constraints, you have the option to flexibly plan between these limits in production planning and detailed scheduling. At the same time, production planning and detailed scheduling adheres to the global SAP IBP supply plan as it stays within the given limits.

Consequently, you can now create inhouse production orders and distribution orders in production planning and detailed scheduling based on the SAP IBP plan. Specifying constraints for production planning and detailed scheduling helps, for example, to ensure the minimum resource utilization and increase planning stability between the limits.

 

Live Data Access to SAP IBP Planning Area Data from SAP Analytics Cloud 

Customers of SAP Analytics Cloud are now able to visualize data from SAP IBP with a live data connection. The live connection avoids data replication between SAP IBP and SAP Analytics Cloud. The SAP IBP planning data can be visualized and reported on in SAP Analytics Cloud, and in unison with data from other SAP Analytics Cloud data sources, providing an up-to-date view of the supply chain plan and performance.

SAP IBP supply chain planning data can now be more easily combined with financial planning data in support of the Extended Planning and Analysis (xP&A) process. Representing supply chain planning data in financial terms in real-time helps companies more accurately predict and report on financial performance. Planners can visualize the current supply chain plan and performance with best-in-class analysis tools from SAP Analytics Cloud.

We also have impressive news in the area of real-time integration: SAP IBP Real-Time Integration: Empowering Businesses for Smarter, Faster Decisions

More Information

  • SAP IBP What’s New Webinars 2405
  • 2405 What’s New: Help Portal Documentation
  • What’s New in Best Practices
  • SAP IBP Community Page
  • Roadmaps
  • SAP Customer Influence Portal for SAP IBP
  • Questions? Ask here

entry.title: Re: Custom fields for the "Manage Customer Line Items" app: use case
entry.content:
hi any suggested OSS note need to be install for this feature?

i am unable to find the data source on suggested business context in our system.

entry.title: Re: Trigger DESADV Outbound IDOC after transfer order con...
entry.content:
Depends on how you confirm the TO, but some things to consider:

  • check note 393096 and check settings in VL10CUC in case you use idocs
  • make use of user exit EXIT_SAPLL03T_002
  • use an appropriate output requirement (VOFM)

entry.title: Re: Push S/4 HANA Data Event to BTP Event Mesh in ABAP OO Mode
entry.content:
@BlackmanCC From 2023 the table BEH_I_EVENT is effectively "dead".

All the rest: precisely so.

entry.title: Customer Engagement Initiative of SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Runtime: Update and Next Steps
entry.content:
The response to our Customer Engagement Initiative of SAP BTP Cloud Foundry runtime (aka CF runtime CEI) has been amazing! We are excited to share the progress we have made and what's next in this collaborative journey.

What we have done so far:

  • Participant-driven agenda: We have analyzed survey feedback to tailor our CEI sessions, focusing on the interests of developers and IT professionals working on SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment.
  • Onboarding session: An initial call was organized to align everyone with the scope, objectives, and engagement guidelines of CF runtime CEI.
  • Delivered exclusive insights: Our first Insights Forum offered detailed views into our product strategy, upcoming roadmap, and a sneak peek of a new feature.

What's next?

  • Insights Forum: Scheduled on a quarterly basis, these sessions will continue to delve into recent developments, product updates, and broader Cloud Foundry trends.
  • Focus Workshop: Based on participant requests, we'll organize sessions that tackle specific challenges or explore best practices of high interest.

Missed the initial registration? Join us!

While the official enrollment period has closed, we are still looking to expand our CF runtime CEI community. We continue to welcome customers and partners, who are:

  • Using SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment for cloud-native application development,
  • Interested in deeper collaboration and influence on product development,
  • Primarily developers or IT professionals.

How to join:

  1. Contact your SAP representative: Connect with your SAP Account Executive / SAP Sales Representative to start the registration process. If you are not sure who is your SAP Representative, please check this article.
  2. Sign the Feedback Agreement: Participation requires signing an agreement with SAP.

We are eager to expand the impact of this CF runtime CEI and look forward to welcoming new members!

entry.title: Re: How can I convert the person-id-external (Person ID)...

Hi,

Never needed to update the person ID external but the note referred to below by pboulicaut mentions API ConvertAssignmentIdExternal.

We have used this api to update our external assignment Ids via an integration in CPI which takes a file of old/new numbers and does the update

bg

entry.title: Re: AUSAPE FORUM 2024

entry.title: Re: Sap Analytics Cloud check storage usage and availability
entry.content:
Helo Filomena,

I don't believe there is a way to see the total used storage of all your objects on your SAC tenant.

My understanding is that there is not a hard limit to the total amount of disk space your content consumes.

Regarding the amount of memory you have available, this would be dependant on the tenant provisioning you requested so you should have this information available to you. A standard multi-tenant system has 512Gb of memory.

If you have a private tenant then you can find the memory and disk size limits in the online help here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/5f61b6509a5e4d499e8cb9685f32db73.html#system-sizing-and-tuning

entry.title: Re: Manage your project documentation using SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Sinje

If I have some batchs jobs, which are failing, and I want to document, what the operation team, should if a job is failing. I assume, I can do that in documents app?

I can see, I can assign the document I create, to a requesrement, defect, process hierarchy and more. But if I should link the document, to a batch job. Can you help me out here. What is the best way, to document operation procudures for batch jobs ?

entry.title: SAP RAP Refresh issue when update from grand child to root node
entry.content:
HI 

Im working on SAP RAP On Premise 2022.

The BO of the RAP program currently being developed is
It is in the form of Root - Child - GrandChild.

In the current situation, the value of the Grand Child can be modified in the Object Page of the Child Node.
And modifying the Grand Child value is Trigger Update the total field of the Root Node

I use 'Determination on modify' to change the value in real time.

However, if changes to the root are triggered more than once,

The following error occurs:

( For example, after modifying the Grand Child Node field to trigger a change to the header total field,
By creating a new instance in the Grand Child Node, additional updates to the header total field are triggered. )

and This error does not occur when updating a Parent Node (Child of the Root) that is not the Root node.

How can I solve this problem?

entry.title: Re: CPQ 2.0 - How to convert and merge PDF Files via Iron...
entry.content:
Not possible to merge two pdfs and to save the new pdf within CPQ via code because of limitation  :

Forbidden .NET Classes and Namespaces
The following .NET namespaces and classes are forbidden in IronPython scripts:

System.IO

System.Data

System.Configuration

Webcom.Configurator.Util.ConnectionStringProvider

System.Environment

System.GC

System.Type

System.Web.WebPages.Razor

System.Reflection

System.Web

System.Diagnostics

If there are scripts that contain System import * and Webcom.Configurator.Util import * and any of the words from the forbidden classes, the system disables saving scripts (for example, saving is disabled if there is System import * and Data in the same script).

For troubleshooting, please contact the SAP CPQ Support team.

Source: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CPQ/884885f05e6b4c8082254d4d9d63f19b/91907b16b55f4daba0b34a266b9e7d84.html?q=forbidden

entry.title: Re: Introducing the New E-learning ‘Clean Core with SAP Business Technology Platform’
entry.content: Hi @sudha_naik link is not working for me, SUP_ELE_6030_2404 does not give any result in library

entry.title: Re: Behavior Extension - an example of developer extensibility
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for the blog!

The app Manage Manual Reservations uses a RAP BO interface I_ReservationDocument. -- Can you tell me how did you find that the app uses this specific BO interface "I_ReservationDocument"?
From the app OData/Entities I found that it uses C_ReservationDocTP_F4839 which is based on R_ReservationDocumentHeaderTP. But I did not find I_ReservationDocument associated to F4839.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere News in April
entry.content:
April was for real 💯 with regards to great new features for SAP Datasphere. There are also lots of excellent new blogs in the community and in case you missed it, our What’s New in SAP Datasphere session covering Q1 just ran in early April.

What’s New in SAP Datasphere Q1 2024 Webinar

We just ran our Q1 What’s New in SAP Datasphere session on April 10th 2024. No worries, in case you missed it. The session covering the features and functions delivered in Q1 2024 was recorded and is available on YouTube.
Watch the recording 👇

 

My top features in April

➡️ Confluent Kafka as Target for Replication Flows

After delivering the native Apache Kafka connection already back in November 2023, you can now use Confluent Kafka and the corresponding connection type to add targets to replication flows. 
For more information: Using Confluent Kafka As the Target and Integrating Data via Connections

➡️ Cataloging offers ability to add an SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge as a Source System

You can add an SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge system to the catalog and have the metadata objects monitored and extracted to the catalog. Once extracted, you can publish these objects as assets to the catalog and use them in the impact and lineage diagram.
For more information: Connecting to Data Sources and Evaluating Catalog Assets

➡️ Measure Type Non-Cumulative Measure for Analytic Models

You can now create non-cumulative measures for analytic models. This type of measure is used for cases where measure values describe a state that is not changing every day. For example, you can use non-cumulative measures to calculate the stock in a warehouse, the bank balance of an account or certain values in HR use cases.
For more information: Create a Non-Cumulative Measure .

➡️ Add a Visual Tenant Type Indicator

When you are working with multiple tenants you can now add a visual tenant type indicator to distinguish which system you are using. For example, between a test or production system. When enabled, a colored information bar is visible to all users of the tenant, and the browser favicon is updated with the matching color. 
For more information: Display Your System Information

 

 

Blogs for our Japanese Community

  • SAP Datasphere インテリジェントルックアップ : 名寄せ機能のご紹介
  • SAP Datasphere : データアクセス制御 (行レベルセキュリティ)
  • SAP Datapshereでの HANA Cloud, Data Lake の利用方法
  • SAP S/4HANAとSAP Datasphereのデータ連携 : データフローの作成
  • SAP S/4HANAとSAP Datasphereのデータ連携 : リモートテーブル(仮想テーブル)の作成
  • SAP S/4HANAとSAP Datasphereのデータ連携 : 接続(リモートソース)の設定
  • SAP S/4HANAとSAP Datasphereのデータ連携 : SAP S/4HANA システムの設定
  • SAP S/4HANAとSAP Datasphereのデータ連携 : Cloud Connectorの設定
  • SAP S/4HANAとSAP Datasphereのデータ連携 : DP Agentの設定
  • SAP S/4HANAとSAP Datasphereのデータ連携

 

My top blogs in April

Excellent blog from @AlexLePape outlining the integration of SAP Datasphere with the Customer Data Platform (CDP) through Direct Data Access
➡️ Unlocking the Power of Customer Data – SAP Customer Data Platform and SAP Analytics Cloud.

@ClaudiaFiess started a blog series about SAP extractors and SAP Datasphere with many great details on the different scenario options:
➡️ Exploring Integration Options in SAP Datasphere with the focus on using SAP extractors
➡️ Exploring Integration Options in SAP Datasphere with the focus on using SAP extractors - Part II

Another favorite in April is @jaigupta excellent deep dive into currency conversion and the derivation of variables
➡️ Using Variable derivation for currency conversion measures within Analytic Model

The last blogs I’d like to highlight is about the command line interface. @Yves_Kipfer checks on the new feature of CRUD operations 
➡️ Use CRUD Operations with SAP Datasphere Command-Line-Interface

More blogs to check out

  • Hybrid Scenario: Usage of SAP HANA Calculation View on SAP Datasphere
  • SAP Datasphere + SAP S/4HANA: Your Guide to Seamless Data Integration
  • Hybrid Architectures: A Modern Approach for SAP Data Integration
  • SAP Datasphere's updated Pricing & Packaging: Lower Costs & More Flexibility
  • Quick & Easy Datasphere - When to use Data Flow, Transformation Flow, SQL View?
  • Enhance your SAP Datasphere Experience with API Access
  • Use CRUD Operations with SAP Datasphere Command-Line-Interface
  • Exploring Integration Options in SAP Datasphere with the focus on using SAP extractors - Part II
  • SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel and SAP Datasphere connection
  • 10+ ways to reshape your SAP landscape with SAP Business Technology Platform – Blog 4
  • Data Flows - The Python Script Operator and why you should avoid it
  • Enhanced Data Analysis of Fitness Data using HANA Vector Engine, Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud
  • Join and innovate with the SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council (ESAC) Program
  • Pilot: SAP Datasphere Fundamentals
  • Customers and Partners are using SAP BTP to Innovate and Extend their SAP Applications
  • SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
  • SAP Datasphere: Using Variable derivation for currency conversion measures within Analytic Model
  • Replication flows: SAP Datasphere to Google BigQuery
  • Exploring Integration Options in SAP Datasphere with the focus on using SAP extractors
  • SAP Datasphere - Space, Data Integration, and Data Modeling Best Practices
  • Knowledge Graphs on Datasphere and HANA Cloud. The differences
  • Unlocking the Power of Customer Data – SAP Customer Data Platform and SAP Analytics Cloud

Find more information and related blog posts on the topic page for SAP Datasphere. You will find further product information on our Community with various subpages about Getting Started, Business Content, the SAP BW Bridge as well as content for Best Practices & Troubleshooting and the FAQ for SAP Datasphere.

Find out how to unleash the power of your business data with SAP’s free learning content on SAP Datasphere. It’s designed to help you enrich your data projects, simplify the data landscape, and make the most out of your investment. Check out even more role-based learning resources and opportunities to get certified in one place on  SAP Learning site.

entry.title: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 13
entry.content: In this episode we look at the difference between the different standard events for providing custom logic and start to add some logic of our own. Everyone welcome, especially beginners, come and join us for friendly chat and curiosity-driven learning-by-doing!

entry.content:
Hello thank you for your blog. It is very beneficial.

But I have a question I can not move the custom field from header to Sales overview screen. I can move between tabs with parking lot as you instructed. How can move between screen? Is there an option to achieve this. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Service Cloud V2 - Case creation in Full screen mode
entry.content: nope, also not sure if it will come eventually

entry.title: Re: DO NOT Install BusinessObjects BI 4.3 SP04 or 4.3 SP04 Patch 1
entry.content:
Hello,
I completely agree with what was said by
nscheaffer. The latest version of SAP BI 4.3 SP04 Patch 300 is a total disappointment. I did a clean install according to all SAP recommendations, with all necessary MSVC++ packages, but the result is bad.
When trying to create a user or user group, an error appears: "Failed to commit objects to server:Undefined Inf Store Error". I tested it with all patches: 100,200,300 - the result is the same. The strange thing is that it only happens with User, Users Group and their import. When creating folders, no problem!
There seems to be a problem with the BOE.war file or some DLL is missing.

Any help would be appreciated!!!

entry.title: Re: Authorization object delivered by SAP
entry.content:
In theory, you could add values to the activities managed by SAP: Table TACT, text table TACTT and table TACTZ per authorization object. But the first table is taged as 'S' System table, edited only by SAP, change = modification... ☹️

As you'd have to add the code to test this value anyway, wouldn't it be better to leave the standard unchanged and create your own authorization object under SU21?

Which "activity" do you require that doesn't exist?

entry.title: Re: Fill in spool options without dialog in Smartforms
entry.content:
Hi,

how do you get print_co and print_opts structures populated?

I've tried inside and outside the LOOP where I have prod.ord number but they keep being empty.

Also tried FM CO_PRINT_IMPORT_DATA  and I get exception 1 "MEMORY_ID_PPT_NOT_EXIST ".

Thanks

entry.title: Can the plan viewer be used stand-alone?
entry.content:
Is it possible to start the plan viewer without first opening dbisql?
Or does a command line parameter exists for dbisql to start into the plan viewer directly?

entry.title: Is activation of US language a requirement/prerequisite for IAS/IPS?
entry.content: Today we only have English UK and French in all our instance. We are also planning to activate the English US language and the IAS/IPS. I wonder if there is connection between the two i.e. the language should be activated first before IAS/IPS?

entry.title: Re: All SAP ECC 6.0 systems now connect to SAP Signavio Process Insights: Unlocking new transformati
entry.content:
@JBN_1111 New Connections enable:

  • Enterprise Systems (SAP)
  • Cloud storage/Warehouse
  • Database
  • Other (Non-SAP) :-
    • Elastic
    • Ingestion API
    • MS-SQL server
    • SAP Cloud Integration :-
      • SAP Standard Connectors to 3rd party systems
      • Built iFlows to 3rd party systems

We have sent an email that outlines our requirements.

entry.title: Re: New Card Upload Process and Role-based Filtering of Cards in Work Zone Adv
entry.content:
Hi Jinghe,
thank you for sharing the guide "How to upload a new card" with the new procedure.

In my case, I have many cards already uploaded in SAP Build Workzone. No problem If I try to upload a new card, but I cannot update the cards (uploaded with the old procedure via the "UI Cards" section in the Administration Console) without removing it and uploading again via the new one. 

How can I update the cards without removing them? This point is very important, because by removing the card I will lost all configurations, and it is breaking for my customers.

Waiting for your feedback

Thanks
Kind Regards
Marco

entry.title: Re: How can I convert the person-id-external (Person ID)...
entry.content:
Hi bg,
I would like to convert the person-id-external.
I know the conversion with the assignment ID in self-service.

Best regards,
Andy

entry.title: Issue with Depreciation Area Values in Assets
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We have encountered an issue with the modification of depreciation area values in our assets module, and we are seeking guidance/ideas/support on how to address it.

More specifically, whenever we modify values in depreciation area 01, it automatically impacts depreciation area 02. Similarly modifications in depreciation area 20 affect area 21 and so forth. However, for our IFRS reporting purposes, we require depreciation area 02 to maintain its own distinct values separate from those of area 01.

This issue has become particularly problematic following a recent merger, during which asset values were transferred in local currency and converted. Unfortunately, we neglected to transfer these values into euros, resulting in discrepancies between the original company's euro values and the exchange rates used during the conversion process.

We are seeking assistance in resolving this issue to ensure accurate reporting in accordance with IFRS standards. Could you please advise if there is a transaction type or alternative approach that would allow us to modify depreciation area values independently without impacting other areas?

Your prompt attention to this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Issue when running CJ88
entry.content:
Hi all,

Please let me know about the OK17 configuration..how it works?? When I run CJ88 for WBS system is picking the GL account assigned in OK17..but it is not defined in the company code. No issue up to last month but suddenly the GL assigned in OK17 is stopping the wbs settlement

How system is picking this GL for CJ88 settlement?

entry.title: Re: How can I convert the person-id-external (Person ID)...
entry.content: As already formulated in my question, I am interested in the person-id-external and not the UserID or Assignment ID. According to the documentation, I should also be able to convert the person-id-external.

entry.title: Re: Introducing the New E-learning ‘Clean Core with SAP Business Technology Platform’
entry.content: I have an active S-user @sudha_naik

entry.title: How to setup SAP Build process automation action project and cap multi tenant application?
entry.content:
In tutorial Create an action project using the OpenAPI specification of a simple CAP Service the configuration of an action-project/action to access a simple CAP application in the same BTP subaccount  than the SAP Build process automation service/subscription is described.

But what if the CAP application is a multi tenant application, where the application provider is in the same  subaccount than the SAP Build process automation service (and SAP Build process automation subscription) and multiple subscriber of the CAP application are located in their own BTP subaccount. 

How is the SAP Build process automation setup/configuration in this case?

entry.title: Sales Order Short Close if similar sales order to be posted
entry.content:
Hello all,

Is it possible to short close sales order where our client has a open sales order where out of 1000 qty we have delivered 800 qty and no further deliveries are to be processed as they have received a new sales order for the same material from prior sales order with a new Price or similar changes and they want to see all the sales order similar inorder to take a decision in whether to short close or to keep it open. 

Is there such an option or configuration to show the previous similar sales orders and take a decision whether to short close or keep them open? and if there is further explanation required do let me know.

 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content: Thanks a lot, very useful!!

entry.title: Re: Custom UI Integration Card Development in SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi @nicoletorres 

I encountered the same issue.
Uploading cards and deployment has now changed and is achieved through the App Editor in Content Manager.
https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-advanced-edition/sap-build-work-zone-advanced-edition/configuring-apps-with-card-visualization 

It was on the roadmap that there would be more permissions for UI Cards so maybe that's why more working with roles is now possible.

entry.title: Re: Regular expression to find a string that begins with > and ends with }
entry.content:
Hi mates

i have a doubt, do this Regular Expressions work the same in the country specific value conversion tool? Because i am trying some and are not working but are written in the guides you mention, do you know if it does not accept everything?

 

Regards

entry.title: Succession Nomination Portlet behaviour
entry.content:
SAP SuccessFactors HXM Suite  SAP SuccessFactors Succession & Development 

 

Dear Community,

we're facing the following unexpected behavior. 

We want the direct manager are able to nominate successor for their direct repots. This is working well. 

Additionally, the managers the hierarchy above should just view the nomination portlet with respective proposal but should not be able to edit this. 

Therefore we have created two RBP roles:

1) For direct managers with the according succession planning permission. (Target Population: Direct reports)

2) Mangers Hierarchy above without succession planning permission, just with the view permission for the nomination portlet. But even though the managers+ can still edit the nomination portlet. 

 

Do you have an idea how to fix this? 

 

Big cheers in adavance!

 

Best,

Gunnar

entry.title: Production documents not imported - SFM
entry.content:
Hi there,

atm im trying to set up SFM for master data import from a S4/HANA System. I was able to import all of the relevant master data, except the porduction documents. The system is allowed to replicate all the CDS Views required. Why is that? Any ideas?

Help is much appriciated!

entry.title: SAP Java Buildpack Contribution
entry.content:
Hello Community & SAP,

We are from the known Application Performance monitoring tool.
Our goal is to enable the monitoring of the application deployed with SAP CF.
We have contributed our code to Cloud Foundry's Java Buildpack.
However we are not able to figure out the way to contribute to "SAP Java Buildpack"
Is SAP Java Buildpack open source ? How we can contribute to it ?

Thank you

entry.title: TCS calculating as per singular invoice value rather than Cummulative invoices
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition environment for India localization. We have maintained the TCS configs as per the SAP suggested but the calculation for TCS is only if a single invoice value crosses the threshold limit (in our case-50,00,000) and not considering all the previous invoices posted.

The configurations done by me are as follows:-

1. Maintained access sequence ZDU1 after creating new condition table for the same.

2. Assigned the same for the Condition type JTC1 :-

3. Further we have maintained a condition record for condition types JTCB and JTC1 :-

 We have further maintained all identification numbers:

  • IN3 - GSTIN
  • AADHAR - AADHAR NUMBER
  • PAN - PAN NUMBER

even after such configurations we have initially posted 3 invoices as follws

1. Amount:- Rs. 19,00,000 (did not calculate TCS)

2. Amount:- Rs. 19,00,000 (did not calculate TCS)

3. Amount:- Rs. 10,00,000 (did not calculate TCS)

as the cumulative billing document posted amount to Rs. 48,00,000 and we have maintained a threshold limit of Rs. 50,00,000 we further posted a 4th billing document. we have maintained the TCS Threshold Fiscal Year wise.

4. Amount:- Rs. 10,00,000 (still did not calculate TCS)

 

 

Kindly guide if any other configurations are to be done. As this is very crucial for India Localization.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Introducing the new pipeline concept in Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hello Alex,

Thank you for the interesting concept.

  • Regarding the seven steps, this would imply that a message needs to be paid for seven times.
  • Next, I always consider it problematic to directly transfer the logic of an old system into a new one by one to one manner.
  • I think that "the elephant in the room" is being ignored by SAP: Many communication adapters already offer a queuing capability via JMS. The number of JMS queues is limited. Now, each communication channel uses its own JMS queue. This raises the question of whether the technical approach itself is correct, or if SAP should create more practical solutions.
  • The B2B solution already relies on TPM. Now, the next solution is being developed, which has similar approaches, but seems to start over from scratch. I miss a more generalist approach.
  • In addition, the XI-Adapter needs the quality of service configured differently from Process Orchestration. Therefore, you will still face the challenge of configuring different endpoints in sending SAP systems.

I did some related suggestions for improvement SAP influence:

Possibility to customize the JMS Queue in asynchronous adapters
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/321756

Different instances of one iFlow with different configurations
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/321757

Remove quality of service configuration from XI Sender adapter
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/321760

Regards
Bernd

entry.title: Re: How can I convert the person-id-external (Person ID)...

entry.title: -132 Error during SBO user authentication
entry.content:
Dears,

I am using IIS service to connect SAP Business One 10.00.170 FP 2108 via DI API using following code which works perfectly , recently we upgraded to SAP Business One 10.00.210 FP 2305 and facing following error while connecting to DB.

-132 Error during SBO user authentication

 public SAPbobsCOM.Company fnGetCompany()
 {
     oCompany = new Company();
     oCompany.Server = "NDB@SAPHANA:30013";
     oCompany.LicenseServer = "SAPHANA:40000";
     oCompany.DbServerType = BoDataServerTypes.dst_HANADB;
     oCompany.CompanyDB = "TEST_COMPANY";
     oCompany.UserName = "manager";
     oCompany.Password = "****";
     oCompany.DbUserName = "****";
     oCompany.DbPassword = "*****";
     oCompany.UseTrusted = true;
     oCompany.language = BoSuppLangs.ln_English;
     oCompany.SLDServer = "SAPHANA:40000";
     int result = oCompany.Connect();
     if (result != 0)
     {
         MessageBox.Show( oCompany.GetLastErrorCode() + " " + oCompany.GetLastErrorDescription());
     }
         return oCompany;

 }

What could be possible reasons ? @ANKIT_CHAUHAN

entry.title: Adaptation Project: Add arbitrary fields and controller logic
entry.content:
I want to add additional fields in an adaptation project which are not in the OData model.

Presumably this means having to add a local (JSON) model for the new custom fields as well.

(The requirement would be to set a value in the OData model based on the new field).

Looking through the documentation, I cannot see anything that fits this kind of enhancement (Adapt the UI | SAP Help Portal).

Is there a way, in an adaptation project, to:

  1. Add arbitrary/new fields in an adaptation project
  2. Add a JSON model for the new fields' values
  3. Enhance the controller to respond to events from the new fields?

SAP Fiori

entry.title: Re: iOS build fails
entry.content:
Well, okay, it looks like I finally succeeded in compiling my app!

  • I started all over again on Apple app store connect: removed all certificates and even deleted the draft app.
  • I created a new app with a different bundle identifier and with the Display Name without spaces this time.
  • Then new provisioning file and new .p12 certificate.

I can't say exactly which of these was the solution to my problem but I was now able to upload my build to TestFlight.

I hope I can be of help to some of you!

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services
entry.content:
Interesting to see how it extracts data with the minimum of information:

Some small mistakes like the quantity not separately placed in the quantity field but merged in the ingredients field, even after changing the type of Quantity. Highlights almost fully correct.

entry.title: Re: SAP VIM Presentation in SITKOLKATA on 27th April 2024
entry.content:
The SAP VIM presentation post on the SAP Community blog is a valuable resource for those interested in enterprise resource planning (ERP). It provides insights into Vendor Invoice Management (VIM) within the SAP framework, which is crucial for efficient financial operations. The presentation’s focus on a real-world event adds practical relevance, and the date indicates it’s a future-oriented topic. Engaging with such content can enhance understanding of SAP VIM and its application in various business scenarios. It’s great to see community members sharing their expertise and contributing to collective learning.

 

Best Regard,
dollartree-compass.com

entry.title: Without borders - What future skills are universal?
entry.content:
Some topics I cross on a regular basis, are just on my plate because I am part of the corporate learning bubble. Starting the podcast on future skills, which is not a new topic but still meets questioning looks, I thought this discussion must held independently from industries and roles people are in.

This is why my Co-host David Chaviano set down with our inspiring college Wayne Pau to talk about core skills, that are both essential and universal.

It is no surprise that “learning how to learn” or “hyper learning” was on top of the list. A point Wayne mentioned I highly appreciated was “listen twice as much as you talk”. In a world so rapidly changing and being so loud, we definitely have to strengthen our active listening. You can not just focus on being heard by others, but also listen to what they have to say.

Speaking of change, I'd like to close with a quote that encapsulates the right attitude toward it: “Be in love with your problem, but not necessarily with your solution.”

Tune in and don’t miss this entertaining conversation with Wayne, who is also a huge Lego fan from an early age and continues to build—albeit now in the realm of software as a professional.

entry.title: Re: Journal entries not listed on incoming payment created by DI API

entry.title: How to set up workflow for QM notification in SAP
entry.content:
Hellow,

My customer wants to set up automatic workflow for QM notification tasks in SAP , he has 4 identified tasks and his request is that the first task will be launched by default when QM notification is generated and then the next task is generated after first task comletion  ...etc

A group of people has to be defined for each task 

He also wants that an SAP notification will be sent when tasks are generated 


Could you please help me with this setup?

 

Thank you 

best regards

entry.title: Re: Use SAP Datasphere for S/4HANA Data Migration Staging...
Re: Use SAP Datasphere for S/4HANA Data Migration Staging...
entry.content: Hey Michael, appreciate your answer. Currently, I have a dedicated admin user with all authorisations in the space for this. But if I add all the credentials and hostname as per SAP_COM_0678, the migration cockpit gives me a connection error. And I have whitelisted S/4 IP's: 130.214.228.32/27 130.214.242.32/27. There is no way for me to debug the connection issue more. Have you done this before?

entry.title: India - Backup Book of Accounts (MCA requirement) - KBA 3309423
entry.content:
Resolution referred to in KBA 3309423 re  
(1) Data Extraction     and
(2) Business Analytical Reports
is very generic and does not offer any solution.
What SAP objects & reports do constitute 'Book of Accounts' in line with Section 128 of the Companies Act 2013 resp Rule 3 of the Companies (Accounts) Rules, 2014? 
'... Amended Rule 3(5) requires companies to maintain the backup of the books of accounts and other relevant books and papers in an electronic mode on servers physically located in India on a daily basis (earlier periodic basis), even in cases where such backups are maintained at a place outside India. The amendment draws reference to maintaining backups on a daily basis ...'.
Anybody does have any suggestions and/or solutions implemented in their environment (SAP ERP hosted in Germany and backup/data extraction/reports ... required at our India locations as per above)?
Any suggestions are highly welcome!
Thanks in advance & Kind regards,
Hubert

I missed to attend the webinar. Can you please provide me the link for audio recording or PDF?

Regards,

Naresh Dasika

entry.title: Re: RISE with SAP: Navigating Vulnerability and Patch Management in SAP Enterprise Cloud Services –

Thanks.

entry.title: Increase the useful life of an asset with a new depreciation key interval
entry.content:
Hi All,

Lets say, there is an asset with value 10,000 EUR with a scrap value of 1000, EUR and Useful life of 5 years (Straight line). In the 5th year, when the asset gets to its scrap value of 1000 EUR, we want to extend the Useful life of the asset by lets say 2 years and then depreciate it fully per straight line (500 EUR per year) . Can we achieve this by adding a new interval ? I added a new interval but it doesnt extend the useful life of the asset and depreciates fully in 5th year

Kind regards

Gitank

entry.title: Re: New 1H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content:
Hi Volker,

thanks a lot for this great overview of the new features of SF Time Tracking!

I have two questions I'd be very thankful for to get some light into:

  1. Is it planned to have an embedded functionality in SF for shift planning by managers?
  2. This is very specific: when does a day count as working day? When somebody clocks in?
    E.g.: EE clocks in on Monday, 10pm. Clocks out on Tuesday, 6am. Is Monday or Tuesday counted as the working day of the EE?

Thanks a lot in advance for your answers!

Best regards,
David

entry.title: SAP Companion - Guided Tour step automation issue
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm having some trouble with the guided tour object automation of an Execute button in our of our custom S/4HANA apps. 

The object recognition/assignment seems to work fine, and the button is highlighted in green:

 

The element coding is captured: 

However, when it comes to automation, the Click on Element option doesn't work in playback. 

Instead the only option to progress to the next guided tour step is to click the Next button. 

Does anybody have any ideas why the Click on Element option may not be working and any potential workarounds to fix this?

Many Thanks,

Andrew

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Inverse Formula Behaviour
entry.content:
Hi friends,

I'm currently utilizing an inverse formula to determine the sales price based on gross sales and sales volume.

When I adjust the price, the gross sales are appropriately recalculated. This works well.

Similarly, when I modify the gross sales, the price adjusts accordingly. This is also functioning correctly.

However, when I alter the sales volume, it adjusts the price instead of the desired adjustment in gross sales. Is there a method to achieve this without resorting to the "Lock Cell" feature, perhaps through a default setting?

 

 Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Re: SAP Application Interface Framework road map now in SAP Road Map Explorer
entry.content:
Hi Alexander,

Thanks for your blog. 

I was checking the Roadmap Explorer for Interface monitoring but it was not clear to me if SAP AIF will stay in the future for S/4HANA Private cloud edition. Also, with the recent focus on Integration Monitoring via SAP Cloud ALM, will AIF as a product still stay alive in the future ?

Can you please give some insights into this ?

Thanks & Regards,

Satyaki

entry.title: ABAP CodeRetreat OnSite in Bern
entry.content:
We are back again this year with an in Person ABAP Community Event!

We will have fun on the 15th of June 2024 with an ABAP CodeRetreat.

This is a great opportunity to experience a Code Retreat in ABAP and to expand your ABAP-Skills. Spend the day with ABAP-colleagues, connect with your peers, learn from each other, share experiences and be inspired by the great community.
Just bring your own laptop and prepare beforehand your Environment. (See Details below)

This Event is sponsored!
Thanks to Swisscom (Schweiz) AG

So lunch, snacks and soft drinks for free!

Try to prepare beforehand your Environment:

  • Install ADT Tools > link
  • Install your own Trial-System (if you don’t have one.)

This Event is restricted to max 30 Participants!
The schedule is from 09:00 - 16:30 (CET).
From 08:30 it will be possible to enter the company.
Language English (if necessary, we will simultaneously translate in German).

Event location:
Swisscom Office near the main station Bern, Genfergasse 14,
3011 Bern Switzerland - Room G127

We are looking forward to meeting you again in Person in Bern!

for organisational reasons, please register on the Meetup Page:

ABAP CodeRetreat - Onsite Event in Bern -, Sat, Jun 15, 2024, 9:00 AM | Meetup

entry.title: Request to enter a PIN for smart card when launching SAP GUI/Windows 11
entry.content:
Whenever launching SAP GUI on a virtual desktop (Windows 11 SAP Corporate), I am requested to enter a PIN for a smart card - please refer to the screenshot attached.

If I close this window, it appears again. After being closed for the second time, SAP GUI starts normally. However, this prevents some SAP GUI scripts I am using from functioning - SAP GUI cannot be launched without these windows having been closed.

This has started last week without me anyhow changing SAP GUI or Windows settings. I have tried to re-install SAP GUI, but it did not help.

Any tips how to stop this behaviour?

entry.title: Authorization in BOPF generated through CDS
entry.content:
Hello,

I can not find a documentation for this.

I want to use the generic authorization concept of BOPF to save me a lot of work for implementing authorizations into my application.

A easy way to work with BOPF is to generate them out of an cds view with the ObjectModel annotation.  I created an cds view with these annotation and it generated an BOPF. No I want to assign an authorization object to the generated BOPF. The only option I can see in ADT is the authorization tab. I can add an authorization class there but these results in errors. In SAP in transaction BOBX the option “Businessw Object has Authorization checks” is not chooseable.

Is this not possible because cds view authorization works over access controls?

But my understanding is that these only work for read access. But I need to authorization for all crud operations. Is there something I missed?

Thanks for the help.

entry.content:
don't miss the Physical event in Bern: 15.6.2024

ABAP CodeRetreat OnSite in Bern - SAP Community

entry.title: Retrieve list of configuration file that derive company code name during OCR process.
entry.content: There is a configuration file that looks at variations of how a company code name could come in during the OCR process. The file has many different way a supplier may send an invoice for Wisconsin Public Service for example it may send WPS and the file sees that it means Wisconsin Public Service. It has all the variations that may be used for a company code. How to retrieve or extract those data, what tcode used in VIM.

entry.title: Re: Is offline mobile apps achievable with SAP Build Apps?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Are there maybe already any updates or changes to it - does Build Apps already have any offline capabilities?

Thank you and best regards, 
Goran

entry.title: Re: Enhance your SAP Datasphere Experience with API Access
entry.content:
Hi @TuncayKaraca ,

thanks for your feedback!
As CLI and API are closely linked, I want to tie that connection between the two with a focus on API. I think it is important to note, that for most use cases the CLI is a tool to call the currently internal APIs that Datasphere is offering.
We are expecting those APIs to be made publicly available so that when embedding API calls into scripting, people do not need to go the way through the CLI.

Thanks and BR,

Thore

entry.title: Re: RKSV (Austria) - new certificates by A-Trust / error...

Dear Rüdiger,

as far as I know, there are serveral different RKSV Provider in Austria - I don't know which USB-RKSV provider are supported by customer checkout. In the last year we often used RKSV CLOUD variants like products from primesign (also local VDA in Austria).

I think the first priority ist to raise an issue to sap, the above mention possible solutions are work arounds 🙂

BR from Vienna, Christian

Axel

entry.title: Re: RKSV (Austria) - new certificates by A-Trust / error...
entry.content: @CHKNELL Thank you for your input. Did you use the RKSV CLOUD variants with the standard CCO RKSV plugin?

entry.title: Fiori PO Approver app Accept and Reject button customization from ECC backend
entry.content:
Please go though the Part 1 Forward Button customization for better understanding.

Many time there are custom requirements for which it requires the need of creating Enhancement in standard SAP functionality.

Overview : PO Approvers are maintained in Release Strategy. Once the PO is generated it is set to be approved by PO approvers based on the levels maintained in PPOME structure. Only then the PO will be set to 03 status in EKKO.

Pre-requisite : All the roles and authorization must be given to the approvers to access the PO Approval Tile in SAP Fiori.

Requirement :  If the approver find the PO is incorrect, he will reject the PO. The rejection of PO must contain the rejection text. Since the Text is an optional there comes up the challenge to make it mandatory.

Solution: 

There are many ways to do this 
1. Doing changes in Front-End using BTP/WEB IDE.

2. Making it mandatory from ECC

I chose the 2nd method since there was some issue in licensing the BTP and it was not configured correctly.

Making it mandatory from ECC


My PO tile looks like this 

When the approver click on the Reject button , he must enter the Rejection note. If he doesn't then the PO should not be rejected.

SAP has provided only few objects which can be modified without the BTP framework. PO Approval is one of it. The main thing to note and find the Odata.


How to find the OData which will can be used for my development?
You can find the OData from going to Fiori tile -> Do Frontend debugging-> Refresh the page-> Navigate to Network Tab -> Find Path starting with key words /sap/opu/odata

In my case the OData is GBAPP_POAPPROVAL
/sap/opu/odata/SAP/GBAPP_POAPPROVAL

You can also find it through the XML file 

Now you have the Standard OData name, it must be implemented so that it could connect with the backend system by providing the system name in External system. 

Odata Implementation: The ODATA deployment is Central HUB . We have separate GW systems for hosting Fiori Tiles.

Tcode : /n/iwfnd/maint_service

Now one must get 200 response after connecting it with backend system. 
Tcode : /n/iwfnd/gw_client

Till now OData is successfully configured. Now its time to find the BADI in ECC system to implement. This can be found in my previous Blog
Let me directly jump to the method which would be required to implement.
The method is Change SET_DECISION method

Here the SAP Standard documentation is pretty clear about the way of processing. You can go through it.

Accept : iv_decision = 1.
Reject : iv_decision  = 2.
If you want nothing should happen mark ev_decision_processed = 'X'. 

METHOD IF_GBAPP_EX_APV_PO_RDP~CHANGE_SET_DECISION.
" Standard Documentation: Do not delete

* This method can be used to enable execution of a workitem
* without updating a purchase order. The customer should
* implement the method and call a corresponding function to execute
* the workitem followed by COMMIT WORK.
* To avoid update of the purchase order, it is necessary to set the
* output parameter EV_DECISION_PROCESSED to 'X'.
* Preventing update of a document can be necessary, if the customer
* uses his own workflow where update of purchase order takes place
* in a separate background workflow step.
  IF iv_decision EQ 2.
    IF iv_rejection_text IS INITIAL.
      ev_decision_processed = 'X'.
    ELSE.
      DATA : t_return TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF  BAPIRET2.
      CALL FUNCTION 'ZFIORI_PO_APPROVAL_REJ_CHG' IN UPDATE TASK
        EXPORTING
          iv_ebeln = iv_pc_number
        TABLES
          t_return = t_return.
      COMMIT WORK.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.
ENDMETHOD.


As per my requirement if the approver accept I should not check anything and simply make it happen, hence I have not done anything with iv_decision = 1. If you want, you can add your custom requirement under it. 
For me I have marked ev_decision_processed = 'X', if rejection text/ note in not provided.
I have used a Update Task FM because these were the async call hence the system was giving dump while updating the EKKO. So as to correct this I have divided it in 2 Logical unit. A wait of 5 secs have introduced so that the previous task gets over.


FUNCTION zfiori_po_approval_rej_chg.
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Update Function Module:
*"
*"*"Local Interface:
*"  IMPORTING
*"     VALUE(IV_EBELN) TYPE  EBELN
*"  TABLES
*"      T_RETURN STRUCTURE  BAPIRET2
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Update Function Module:
  WAIT UP TO 5 SECONDS.
  DATA: lr_po           TYPE REF TO cl_po_header_handle_mm,
        ls_bapi         TYPE bapiret2,
        l_result        TYPE mmpur_bool,
        lv_procstat     TYPE ekko-procstat,
        ls_document     TYPE mepo_document.
  CONSTANTS: lc_status TYPE ekko-procstat VALUE '08',
             lc_set_status TYPE ekko-procstat VALUE '03',
             lc_process TYPE char16 VALUE 'PO_PROCESS',
*             lc_trtyp TYPE char1 VALUE 'VER',
*             lc_trtyp TYPE char1 VALUE 'V',
             lc_ind TYPE char40 VALUE 'RELEASE',
             lc_tcode TYPE SY-TCODE VALUE 'ME29N'.


  SELECT SINGLE procstat FROM ekko INTO lv_procstat WHERE ebeln =  iv_ebeln.
  IF lv_procstat EQ lc_status.
*  prepare creation of PO instance
    ls_document-process     = 'PO_PROCESS'.
    ls_document-trtyp       = 'VER'.
    ls_document-doc_key(10) = iv_ebeln.
    ls_document-initiator-initiator = 'RELEASE'.

    CREATE OBJECT lr_po.
    lr_po->for_bapi = 'X'.
    lr_po->po_initialize( ls_document ).
    lr_po->set_po_number( iv_ebeln ).


    CALL FUNCTION 'MEPO_DOC_READ'
      EXPORTING
        im_ebeln                       = iv_ebeln
        im_tcode                       = lc_tcode"'ME29N'
        im_trtyp                       = ls_document-trtyp
*    IM_ID                          =
        im_document                    = ls_document
*   IM_NO_MESSAGING                =
*   IM_NO_MESSAGE_REQ              =
*   IM_NO_AUTHORITY                =
* EXCEPTIONS
*   DOC_NUMBER_MISSING             = 1
*   TRANSACTION_CODE_MISSING       = 2
*   TRANSACTION_TYPE_MISSING       = 3
*   INVALID_CALL                   = 4
*   OTHERS                         = 5
              .
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
    ENDIF.
    DATA : ex_data  LIKE  mepoheader.
    CALL FUNCTION 'MEPO_DOC_HEADER_GET'
      IMPORTING
        ex_ekko = ex_data.

    IF cl_process_state_mm=>is_allowed(
                     im_bstyp   = ex_data-bstyp
                     im_state   = ex_data-procstat
                     im_process = cl_process_state_mm=>c_pr_reset_rej )
                                                          EQ mmpur_no.
      MESSAGE e806(mepo) WITH ex_data-procstat RAISING failed.
    ENDIF.
    ex_data-procstat = cl_process_state_mm=>c_active.
    lr_po->set_data( ex_data ).


    UPDATE ekko SET procstat = lc_set_status WHERE ebeln EQ iv_ebeln.
*    UPDATE ekko SET PROCSTAT = ex_data-procstat where ebeln eq iv_ebeln.
  ENDIF.

ENDFUNCTION.

entry.title: Re: NOTIFICATION FOR FAILED MEASURING POINT VALUES
entry.content:
Thanks for the Reply,

Has anyone ever did this?
Are there any reasons why it should not be done this way?

entry.title: error during sap connection
entry.content:
I'm getting the error 'Failed to create COM object `SAPbobsCOM.Company': Class not registered' when trying to connect PHP with SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.190) FP 2202 (64-bit).

my php error line is"$mycomp = new COM("SAPbobsCOM.Company") or die("Cannot start SBO");"

entry.title: Re: RKSV (Austria) - new certificates by A-Trust / error...
entry.content: Hi! No, we are not in the CCO Business - we provide an SAP AddonOn, that covers the RKSV topics - there you have the options to use the sticks (from different providers) or you can use the Cloud-RKSV Interfaces e.g. from primesign or other providers in Austria. Our add-on is used in the Austrian Cash Desk Solution from SAP or in Z-Apps from customers, that use VA01 e.g. or Z-Developments as SAP POS.

entry.title: Sales BOM
entry.content:
Hello,

Im looking for help how to configure an exploding sales BOM correctly with two plants.
(or perhaps the material is what needs to be configured?)
The scenario is that I have material X, Y, Z and when sold seperately on sales order they should go from plant A.
But when used in a sales BOM I want the material to go from plant B, but as this material is configured to go from plant A I havn't found a way to adjust this except doing it manually in each scenario when the BOM is used in a sales order.

Appreciate any kind of help and sorry if I have posted the question in the wrong board.

entry.title: Re: Use SAP Datasphere for S/4HANA Data Migration Staging...
entry.content: You have to use a database user, not a space user - "Create database users to connect external tools to SAP Datasphere."

entry.title: Re: Use SAP Datasphere for S/4HANA Data Migration Staging...
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/3de55a78a4614deda589633baea28645.html?locale=en-US&source=productlink-webassistant
